notes: Microsoft enterprise/server OS kernel line; became Windows 2000/XP/Server 2003 and all modern Windows
Windows NT 5.0 renamed Windows 2000; released Feb 2000; IntelliMirror, Active Directory, Group Policy; Zero Admin cornerstone

Microsoft's Zero Admin Windows (ZAW) initiative: reduce total cost of PC ownership via IntelliMirror, SMS, Windows Terminals, Terminal Server; core promise was folded into IntelliMirror/Active Directory/Group Policy in Windows 2000
Multi-user Windows server delivering Windows apps to thin Windows-based terminals via RDP/ICA; Microsoft/Citrix codev; precursor to Remote Desktop Services
Microsoft desktop/server inventory, software distribution, and remote-control tool; renamed System Center Configuration Manager 2007; later Microsoft Intune cloud
